programme.title: The Great Barrier Reef: World's most amazing coral reef

programme.title: Sports Adventure Ep503: The Wellerbrucke Rapids… A Kayaker’s Dream

programme.title: Water Matters Ep101 - Freshwater
programme.desc: Water Matters documents water-related environmental issues from around the globe as a number of the world’s best documentary filmmakers and environmental organizations share their stories regarding the planet’s water crisis as well as potential solutions for a healthier world.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep507: Paddling The Galapagos Islands

programme.title: Next Stop Ep209: Queensland, Australia
programme.desc: Next Stop visits Queensland, Australia and explores The Great Barrier Reef, Cairns Tropical Zoo, the Daintree Discovery Centre and Tjapukai Aboriginal Cultural Park.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep112: Deep White - Why Sharks Attack
programme.desc: Deep White explores ways to research sharks to determine why sharks attack and to study innovative ways to train sharks in order to prevent future attacks. Sharks are surprisingly intelligent and able to perform complex tasks. Sharks can distinguish different signals and cues in feeding routines and they develop strong bonds with their trainers.

programme.title: Xplash Ep110
programme.desc: Xplash brings you amazing action in, on, and near water. In this episode, we travel to the Bahamas and witness a world freediving record, fish for crocodiles with coconuts on a rope, and start the show off by checking out a new evolution in human flight.

programme.title: Air Time Podcast - Shin Campos
programme.desc: Shin, the timeless powder hound, has been an iconic presence since the late '80s. With a career spanning decades, he's not only witnessed, but lived through it all. From a gritty renegade in Whistler, crafting local videos with his homies, to scaling the peaks of snowboarding stardom with Tree Top, Absinthe, Standard, White Out, and more. He briefly ventured into mountain guiding but a tragic incident led him to a new path. Today, Shin orchestrates cinematic magic behind the lens, skillfully managing and producing awe-inspiring commercial shoots that dominate the sea-to-sky landscapes. Although he's moved on from professional snowboarding, his passion remains unwavering. Shin's story epitomizes passion, resilience, and evolution. Enjoy the show!

programme.title: K2 Snowboarding Presents: Jumbo Easy
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Dopamine
programme.desc: Dopamine is a naturally occurring chemical produced by the human brain, which controls movement and reward. In the world of progressive snowboarding, the joy of physical movement and the reward of being outside are the two greatest factors motivating riders to evolve and innovate. The Absinthe Films documentary Dopamine captures professional snowboarders pushing boundaries and chasing storms across the Chilkats, Valhallas, Monashees, Dolomites, and Pyrenees mountains.

programme.title: La Zone
programme.desc:
In the early 2000's, snowboard filmer David 'Vlad' Vladyka and a handful of riders discovered an off-the-radar area on the French-Swiss border that held massive potential for shooting freestyle snowboarding. The mountain pass featured rolling terrain punctuated by steep roll overs that are perfect for building jumps. The area was Le Col de Cou, and though it had a name, the riders called it 'La Zone', a purposefully vague nickname that would help them keep the area a secret.
Over the next decade, La Zone would become one of the most productive and standard setting locations for filming freestyle snowboarding in all of Europe. Shots from La Zone were featured in several Absinthe films, and many others.
Now 20 years later, Jones team rider Mat Schaer and Vlad still return to La Zone to film from time to time, but the pristine slopes they enjoyed in the past are much harder to find as Le Col de Cou has become a popular ski touring destination.
Featuring new and historic footage from La Zone, this new short film directed by Julien Rosens, and produced by Absinthe Films, highlights the history, beauty and inevitable evolution of this legendary shred spot.
Credits LA ZONE, a movie directed by Julien Roserens Produced by Absinthe Films Supported by Jonessnowboards, Region Dents du Midi, Doodah store Edited by Jules Guarneri Soundmix by Stephane Chapelle Graphics by René Zumstein Photo by Michael Cordey Music : Tugrul by Ochre, Rhea by Yehezkel Raz, Where It Beginns It Ends by Be Still The Earth, Strange Life de YGGL, Let Us Get Out by Redder

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Vivid
programme.desc: Absinthe Films’ Vivid highlights the breakout years of Travis Rice, Romain De Marchi, Nicolas Müller, and Gigi Rüf, delivering some of their most memorable early riding in a fan-favorite classic.

programme.title: Artist Profile - Scott Lenhardt
programme.desc: Artist Scott Lenhardt has kept everything he’s ever made for Burton Snowboards. Everything he’s ever done is stored in his childhood bedroom. After his year-long solo show at the Vermont Ski Snowboard Museum, he organized his archives. Just like his creative process, this film is mind blowing.

programme.title: Artist Profile - Sebo Walker
programme.desc: In 2022, the art-inspired accessories brand Slowtide launched a summer collection with Portland, Oregon-based artist and skateboarder Sebo Walker. To capture the collaboration, director Jake Price spent a day cruising around Walker’s hometown, seeing the city and learning what inspires his artwork.

programme.title: Without a Paddle
programme.desc: ‘Without a Paddle’ is a canoe film about snowboarding. Four snowboarders retrace a portion of the 19th century explorer David Thompson’s journey down the Columbia River, during one of the coldest cold snaps in Revelstoke’s recorded history. Surreal landscapes, epic paddling, deep powder, and pain.

programme.title: Football Stars
programme.desc: Captain Chiellini, as tough as they come.

programme.title: Foul Play
programme.desc: The eight year suspension for doping of swimmer Sun Yang, the USA's Ryan Lochte is unmasked in Rio and the Australian Dawn Fraser hunts for memories at Tokyo 1964.

programme.title: Heroines
programme.desc: Access to media visibility is one of the biggest challenges for women's sport. The media have the power to choose which stories to tell, fashioning thus the perception of the public and influencing the value of female athletes within society.

programme.title: The Iconic
programme.desc: The Wimbledon 2008 men's final is considered as the greatest of all time… Roland Garros is an emblematic place…. Naomi Osaka is a citizen of world tennis while Novak Djokovic has made history in Australia.

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: Nobody has dominated a grand slam like Rafael Nadal in the French Open… and in 2017, he achieved what everyone thought impossible, in triumphing for the 10th time in the Roland-Garros stadium.

programme.title: Top 20
programme.desc: The TOP 20 is an exclusive collation of the news and the champions causing a buzz on planet sport!

programme.title: Only Live Once

programme.title: Karen on the Rock
programme.desc: Karien Minier is surrounded by tough guys in the company of Felix Baumgartner, Bruce Willis and Kobe Bryant. However, she doesn't forget to glitter with Kanye West, the most stylish rapper of the moment!

programme.title: Fight Stars
programme.desc: They're big. They're audacious. They're the stars of combat sport. The biggest names in combat sport in the ring and on canvas as well as in their personal lives.

programme.title: En Route America
programme.desc: A road trip across the West Coast, following skiers as they explore iconic mountains and chase winter conditions across the United States.

programme.title: En Route Departure
programme.desc: Follow Pep Fujas, Blake Nyman, Anthony Boronowski, Dylan Hood, Eric Pollard, Chris Benchetler and more as they chase storms from a Top Secret Military Mountain Warfare Facility, to the Italian Alps.

programme.title: Falling Angels
programme.desc: Three female BASE jumpers trek deep into the Venezuelan jungle to attempt a historic jump from the world’s highest waterfall, facing extreme terrain, technical challenges, and one of the most dangerous exits in the sport.

programme.title: Gunnie Season
programme.desc: An extreme skiing film featuring some of the world’s top professional skiers pushing their limits on snow and steep terrain.

programme.title: Peace and Left
programme.desc: A surf series following Hugues Oyarzabal, capturing spectacular first-person barrel footage at iconic spots around the globe, offering a rare inside view of high-performance surfing.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 5
programme.desc: For its fifth event of the sixth season, the ultra-high performance one-design catamarans were invited to visit Muscat for the final event of the 2019 GC32 Racing Tour, the GC32 Oman Cup. The event, held in Muscat, has been jointly organized by Oman Sail and the host venue partners EFG Private Banking as well as fragrance brand Amouj and the Sultanate of Oman Ministry of Tourism. The Oman Cup was the final of the 2019 GC32 Racing Tour and will decide this year’s overall podium places. Unquestionably the big fight was for top spot between the local heroes Oman Air and Ernesto Bertarelli’s World Champions Alinghi.With so many teams close on the leader board, there was the potential for some crucial match races amongst the fleet.

programme.title: Les Voiles de Saint Tropez - Episode 1
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 3
programme.desc: In this episode, we are travelling to the other side of the world for the second act of the Kitefoil World Series to see if Toni Vodisek can keep up with his great performance beating and second fleet after Gizzeria. The 19-year-old Slovenian has secured his first regatta on the professional kite racing circuit. Will he beat the lead from Axel Mazella?

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 4
programme.desc: In this episode we are taking a domestic flight to the east coast of Fujian Province, Pingtan, for the Kitefoil World Series. programme.title: 72 Horas Para Morir
programme.desc: Su madre lo dejo en manos de su padre siendo un niño y el lo preparo para ser un gatillero y hacerse cargo del territorio de Texas, por eso lo apodan el Texano. Un día en la calle se encuentra con una mujer y ella le adivina su futuro, le dice que tiene 72 horas para morir... el texano no lo cree pero algo muy malo esta por suceder.

programme.title: Vigilia
programme.desc: Santiago amanece desnudo y golpeado en medio del desierto. El joven se incorpora muy aturdido y retorna a su casa paterna.

programme.title: Soy Una Buena Persona
programme.desc: Sabina es una treintañera muy "artista" convencida de que podrá algún día vivir de su arte como diseñadora, actriz, guionista o directora, porque ella está destinada a petarlo. Mientras, como casi toda su generación, malvive gorroneando en casa de sus padres. Pero una noche tiene, por desgracia ajena, una oportunidad de lujo... y no dudará en aprovecharla sin pensárselo demasiado.

programme.title: Distopia
programme.desc: Impulsados por antiguos planes esotéricos, poderosas elites ocultas emplean armas bioquímicas, guerra psicológica, cuarentenas mundiales, e incluso magia negra para controlar el futuro de la humanidad y alcanzar la inmortalidad

programme.title: Er Relajo Del Loro
programme.desc: Un loro que tras ser vendido a unos traficantes de animales cuando era pequeño, va pasando de dueño en dueño durante toda su vida y cambiando su nombre de acuerdo a su propietario, mirando frente a sus ojos la evolución de Venezuela durante 50 años (1950/2000).

programme.title: Eros Una Vez María
programme.desc: María es el gran amor de Tonatiuh, pero él la pierde. Intenta mantener su esencia, buscando incansablemente en cada mujer que conoce, tratando de obtener tantas experiencias sobre ellas como pueda, para poder encontrar algo que le recuerde a su amor perdido. Todas esas mujeres tienen una particularidad: se llaman María.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.
